title: gtkwave: sprintf is depreciated in favor on a more safe snprintf on macOS 13
body:
Currently compiling a verilated project gives depreciated warnings about sprintf, in favor of snprintf

```
In file included from /opt/homebrew/Cellar/verilator/5.006/share/verilator/include/verilated_fst_c.cpp:37:
/opt/homebrew/Cellar/verilator/5.006/share/verilator/include/gtkwave/fstapi.c:5637:42: warning: 'sprintf' is deprecated: This function is provided for compatibility reasons only.  Due to security concerns inherent in the design of sprintf(3), it is highly recommended that you use snprintf(3) instead. [-Wdeprecated-declarations]
                                wx_len = sprintf(wx_buf, "#%" PRIu64 "\n", time_table[i]);
```

```
# installed trough homebrew
verilator --version
Verilator 5.006 2023-01-22 rev UNKNOWN.REV
```

using macOS 13.3.1 (22E261)

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
I can try to make a PR, if there is no other reason than "it has not been done yet" such as "X system does not support it"
